---
title: "Coste-eficacia de PrEP en España"
author: "Philip Wikman"
date: "15 de mayo de 2019"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(ggplot2)
source("HIVSIM02exp05.R")
source("HIVSIMCAL_LCA_LHS.R")
source("invbeta_u.R")
source("invgamma_u.R")
source("rdirichlet_u.R")
source("draw_params_from_u.R")
source("sim_weekly_to_yearly.R")
source("make_slices_HIVSIM.R")
source("rs_at.R")
library(tidyr)
library(parallel)
library(DirichletReg)
library(dplyr)
library(cowplot)
library(lhs)

years<-5
m<-read.csv("MortPobGen.csv", header=TRUE, sep=";")
DistEdad<-vector(length=85)
DistEdad[1:10]<-0.114106384/10
DistEdad[11:20]<-0.116645332/10
DistEdad[21:30]<-0.281029342/10
DistEdad[31:40]<-0.30552628/10
DistEdad[41:50]<-0.112127906/10
DistEdad[51:85]<-0.070564755/35
RiskRed<-1-0.86
```

# Monte Carlo simulations for calibration of the model

## Generation of LHS design for 32 parameters
```{r}
set.seed(123)
N_runs   <- 5000
n_par    <- 28
n_cores  <- 20

U <- randomLHS(N_runs, n_par)

# split indices into 20 chunks
idx_list <- split(1:N_runs, cut(1:N_runs, breaks = n_cores, labels = FALSE))

U_list <- lapply(idx_list, function(idx) U[idx, , drop = FALSE])

cl <- makePSOCKcluster(n_cores)
clusterExport(cl, c("HIVSIMCAL_LHS", "draw_params_from_u","make_slices_HIVSIM","rs_at", "invbeta_u","invgamma_u","rdirichlet_u", "m", "DistEdad", "RiskRed", "HIVSIM"))
clusterSetRNGStream(cl, 123)

ResultParam <- clusterMap(
  cl,
  fun     = HIVSIMCAL_LHS,
  U_block = U_list,
  MoreArgs = list(m = m, DistEdad = DistEdad, RiskRed = RiskRed)
)

stopCluster(cl)
save(ResultParam, file="ResultParam")
```
 
```{r}
load("ResultParam")

# ResultParam: list of length 20 from your cluster run
# Each ResultParam[[i]] is list(R_block, Params_block)

traj_blocks  <- lapply(ResultParam, `[[`, 1L)   # list of lists of data.frames
all_trajs    <- unlist(traj_blocks, recursive = FALSE)

param_blocks <- lapply(ResultParam, `[[`, 2L)   # each 32 x repeats
Params_all   <- do.call(cbind, param_blocks)   # 32 x N_runs

N_runs <- length(all_trajs)
dim(Params_all)  # 32 x N_runs
```

```{r}
# obs_year: data.frame with 5 rows and cols:
#   Year, NewAIDS_obs, AIDSdeaths_obs, NewInf_obs
 obs_year <- data.frame(
   Year = 1:5,
   NewAIDS_obs    = c(196,161,141,136,101),
   AIDSdeaths_obs = c(342,334,293,235,240)*0.26,  #0.26 proportion in Jarrin AIDS 2024. 531,513,385,342,
   NewInf_obs     = c(2406,1713,1741,1810,1757)*1.075# Asumo que la fracción no diagnosticada es del 7.5%, por lo que a los nuevos diagnósticos los incremento un 7.5%. Fuente Informe VIH 2023. 2348,2604 (2013 y 2014) 2457,2529,2532,2431,
)

rmse_newAIDS   <- numeric(N_runs)
rmse_AIDSdeath <- numeric(N_runs)
rmse_newInf    <- numeric(N_runs)

for (i in seq_len(N_runs)) {
  sim_week <- all_trajs[[i]]
  
  sim_year <- sim_weekly_to_yearly(sim_week, years = 5L, weeks_per_year = 52L)
  
  # join by Year to be safe
  df_year <- merge(
    obs_year,
    sim_year,
    by = "Year",
    all = FALSE
  )
  
  # residuals_year
  e1 <- (df_year$NewAIDS_sim    - df_year$NewAIDS_obs)    / mean(df_year$NewAIDS_obs)
  e2 <- (df_year$AIDSdeaths_sim - df_year$AIDSdeaths_obs) / mean(df_year$AIDSdeaths_obs) 
  e3 <- (df_year$NewInf_sim     - df_year$NewInf_obs)     / mean(df_year$NewInf_obs)

  
  rmse_newAIDS[i]   <- sqrt(mean(e1^2, na.rm = TRUE))
  rmse_AIDSdeath[i] <- sqrt(mean(e2^2, na.rm=TRUE))
  rmse_newInf[i]    <- sqrt(mean(e3^2, na.rm = TRUE))
}

# Minimax criterion across the three outcomes
rmse_max <- pmax(rmse_newInf)

best_idx <- which.min(rmse_max)

best_idx
rmse_max[best_idx]
c(
  NewAIDS   = rmse_newAIDS[best_idx],
  AIDSdeath = rmse_AIDSdeath[best_idx],
  NewInf    = rmse_newInf[best_idx]
)

best_params <- Params_all[, best_idx]
best_params
ECM  <- rmse_newAIDS^2
ECM2 <- rmse_AIDSdeath^2
ECM3 <- rmse_newInf^2

```

```{r}

best_sim_week  <- all_trajs[[best_idx]]
best_sim_year  <- sim_weekly_to_yearly(best_sim_week, years = 5L, weeks_per_year = 52L)

plot_df <- obs_year %>%
  inner_join(best_sim_year, by = "Year") %>%
  # reshape to long format
  transmute(
    Year,
    NewAIDS_obs,
    NewAIDS_sim,
    AIDSdeaths_obs,
    AIDSdeaths_sim,
    NewInf_obs,
    NewInf_sim
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -Year,
    names_to = c("outcome", "type"),
    names_pattern = "(.*)_(obs|sim)$",
    values_to = "value"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    outcome = case_when(
      outcome == "NewAIDS"    ~ "New AIDS cases",
      outcome == "AIDSdeaths" ~ "AIDS deaths",
      outcome == "NewInf"     ~ "New HIV infections",
      TRUE                    ~ outcome
    ),
    type = ifelse(type == "obs", "Observed", "Simulated")
  )

ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = Year, y = value, colour = type)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point() +
  facet_wrap(~ outcome, scales="free_y", ncol = 1) +
  labs(
    x = "Year",
    y = "Annual count",
    colour = "",
    title = "Observed vs simulated (yearly) for best-fitting parameter set"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

```

```{r}
best_params
```
